notes: Do NOT use standard PLA. Sunlight and mechanical stress will cause PLA to fail within one season.

core_plate.notes: Structural heart of the system. High infill required for the pipe collar interface.

extension_slider.notes: Print vertically to ensure the 'Tongue and Groove' tracks are precise.

pipe_collar.notes: Solid plastic required to handle the compression force of the M5 bolts.

sill_support.notes: Highest stress part. Must be extremely rigid.
